_image_size_requirements.billboard_featured_centre: Required image size: ~380x380px display, square (1:1 ratio). Any image works — auto-cropped to fill. Upload a square image at least 600x600px for best quality.
_image_size_requirements.billboard_side_rotating: Required image size: ~220x220px display, square (1:1 ratio). Auto-cropped to fill. Upload a square image at least 400x400px for best quality.
_image_size_requirements.sidebar: Required image size: 320x320px display, square (1:1 ratio). Auto-cropped to fill. Upload a square image at least 600x600px for best quality.
_image_size_requirements.note: Set "featured": true on exactly ONE billboard ad to make it the fixed centre spot. All other active billboard ads rotate through the two side positions automatically. If no ad has featured:true, the first ad in the list becomes the centre by default.
